query: iPhone iPad macOS visionOS Apple Intelligence system requirements compatibility list 2026
a_issues: Content A has only one official Apple source, and that snippet is incomplete for the actual compatibility list: it gives general setup info and watch pairing/language details but not the full iPhone/iPad/Mac/Vision Pro device requirements. Several other results are third-party and introduce likely speculative or conflicting 2026 claims, especially a split between standard Apple Intelligence and a more advanced 12GB-RAM/on-device tier. Examples: Geeky Gadgets says advanced Siri AI requires M3+ and 12GB RAM; Macworld says full on-device features need iPhone 17 Pro or Air; FelloAI says only certain iPhone 17 models get the advanced tier. These claims are not supported by the anchor and could mislead an LLM. A also largely omits visionOS compatibility details except via the Apple Support general mention.
b_issues: Content B includes the key official Apple Support result with explicit system requirements (7 GB storage; iOS/iPadOS/macOS/visionOS/watchOS minimum versions), which is highly relevant. It also includes an Apple Newsroom result saying Apple Intelligence/Siri AI in 2026 are available on iPhone 16 models or later and iPhone 15 ...; however the snippet is truncated, so it is not a clean full compatibility list by itself. The Apple.com Apple Intelligence snippet shown is poor and appears to expose only partial Mac hardware lines rather than the full list. The FelloAI result again introduces speculative/possibly inaccurate 12GB-RAM advanced-tier claims and even mentions a likely nonstandard 'MacBook Neo', so that result is noisy. Still, B has stronger official-source grounding than A.
reasoning: B better enables a correct answer because it contains the most authoritative and directly relevant facts from Apple: the Apple Support page explicitly gives Apple Intelligence system requirements, including minimum OS versions across iPhone/iPad/macOS/visionOS and storage, matching the anchor. It also includes Apple official pages/results that point to 2026 Apple Intelligence availability. A, by contrast, relies more heavily on third-party interpretations that add questionable distinctions about advanced Siri/on-device models and 12GB RAM requirements, with less official support and less direct visionOS/system-requirements coverage. Neither set is perfect, but B provides a more reliable basis for answering the question correctly.
